name: Hon. Vasudeva Nanayakkara, M.P.
academic_qualifications: Studied in Richmond College, Galle; Entered in to Aquinas College in Colombo; Obtained L.L.B. Degree, University of Peradeniya Law faculty; Entered in to the Law College sworn in as an advocate in 1962; G.C.E. (A/L); G.C.E. (O/L)
professional_qualifications: L.L.B. Degree University of Peradeniya Law faculty; Entered in to the law college sworn in as an advocate in 1962.
